creator: jpmg@eng.cam.ac.uk
text:
The amd(8) man page has two command line forms listed in the SYNOPSIS.
The third paragraph of the DESCRIPTION refers to three forms, the first
of which appears to have been left out (making the references to the
"second" and "third" forms particularly confusing).

Fix: I believe that the following diff causes the man page to be
self-consistent:
